mapper.select: select * from ygt_group_buy_campaign where ygt_gbc_group_id = #{groupId} and ygt_gbc_status = 'OPEN' order by ygt_group_buy_campaign_id desc limit 1
select * from ygt_group_buy_campaign where ygt_gbc_group_id = #{groupId} and ygt_gbc_status = 'OPEN' order by ygt_group_buy_campaign_id desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into ygt_group_buy_campaign (ygt_gbc_corp_id, ygt_gbc_group_id, ygt_gbc_nx_community_id, ygt_gbc_title, ygt_gbc_status, ygt_gbc_open_time, ygt_gbc_close_time, ygt_gbc_pickup_time, ygt_gbc_remark, ygt_gbc_create_user_id, ygt_gbc_create_time, ygt_gbc_update_time) values (#{ygtGbcCorpId}, #{ygtGbcGroupId}, #{ygtGbcNxCommunityId}, #{ygtGbcTitle}, #{ygtGbcStatus}, #{ygtGbcOpenTime}, #{ygtGbcCloseTime}, #{ygtGbcPickupTime}, #{ygtGbcRemark}, #{ygtGbcCreateUserId}, #{ygtGbcCreateTime}, #{ygtGbcUpdateTime})
mapper.delete: delete from ygt_group_buy_campaign where ygt_group_buy_campaign_id in #{id}
